qa.summary: QA passed for commit 90d5be0 (TASK-105-1). Review confirmed the change is localized to extension/src/sidepanel/App.tsx and extension/src/sidepanel/App.test.tsx. Targeted verification passed: npm run test --workspace extension -- src/sidepanel/App.test.tsx (40 tests passed) and npm run typecheck --workspace extension. Behavior covered: send remains disabled during collecting, send re-enables after completed response, and same-session follow-up remains sendable when terminal evidence exists even if outer status is still streaming. Note: TASK-105-1 lacks architectureElementId traceability in the graph.
